---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Execra
title: "[FEAT] <short description of the feature>"
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing. -->

---

## 🔥 Problem This Solves

<!-- What problem or pain point does this feature address?
     Describe it from a user's perspective: "As a user, I want to... so that..."
     Do NOT just describe the solution — describe the problem first. -->

---

## ✅ Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working.
     Include any relevant diagrams, mockups, or pseudocode if helpful. -->

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better? -->

---

## 📁 Relevant Module / Area

<!-- Which part of Execra would this feature affect? -->

- [ ] `core/perception/` (screen capture, camera, OCR)
- [ ] `core/intelligence/` (LLM, context engine, trust scorer, consequence sim)
- [ ] `core/digital/` (code tracer, error detector, task decomposer)
- [ ] `core/physical/` (YOLO detector, task recognizer, action validator)
- [ ] `core/hybrid/` (mode manager, action logger, guidance dispatcher)
- [ ] `api/` (new endpoints or WebSocket events)
- [ ] `frontend/` (overlay UI, guidance panel, components)
- [ ] `docs/` (new documentation or guides)
- [ ] New module / Other: ___

---

## 🏷️ Suggested GSSoC Difficulty Level

<!-- What difficulty label do you think this warrants? -->

- [ ] `good first issue` — 10 pts (simple, well-scoped)
- [ ] `easy` — 25 pts (moderate, clear requirements)
- [ ] `medium` — 45 pts (multi-component, requires design thinking)
- [ ] `hard` — 60 pts (core architecture, significant complexity)

---

<!-- Are there existing issues or PRs related to this request? -->

---

<!-- Any mockups, references, research links, or examples that support this idea. -->
